title: Business Referral Network Platform
description: Business networking platform designed to manage referrals and professional connections.
overview: A full-stack platform designed to help businesses manage referrals, strengthen professional networks, and track potential business opportunities through a centralized dashboard.
challenge: Businesses often rely on spreadsheets, emails, and manual communication to manage referrals, making it difficult to track opportunities and maintain professional relationships efficiently.
solution: Developed a referral management system that streamlines referral tracking, lead management, and professional networking while providing a structured workflow for business growth.

title: Learning Management System
description: Learning platform for managing courses, instructors, and student progress.
overview: A centralized academic platform built to simplify course management, assignment handling, and student progress tracking for educational institutions.
challenge: Managing courses, assignments, instructors, and student performance across multiple systems creates inefficiencies and increases administrative workload.
solution: Built a learning management platform that consolidates educational workflows into a single system, improving collaboration between instructors and students.

title: Zuaera Perfume Marketplace
description: Modern eCommerce platform for browsing and purchasing premium perfume products.
overview: A modern eCommerce marketplace developed to showcase and sell premium fragrance products through a visually engaging online shopping experience.
challenge: Customers need a convenient way to discover and purchase premium perfumes, while businesses require an effective platform to present products and manage online sales.
solution: Created a full-stack eCommerce application that enables product discovery, catalog management, authentication, and seamless purchasing workflows.
